title: Iran Executes Protester Erfan Kiani for January Uprising Role
summary: Iran executed Erfan Kiani, accused of leading anti-government protests in Isfahan during the January 2026 uprising.
contents:
# Iran Executes Protester Erfan Kiani for January Uprising Role

## Overview
Iran executed Erfan Kiani, accused of leading anti-government protests in Isfahan during the January 2026 uprising.

## Details
Authorities claimed Kiani, acting for Israel's Mossad, led a group that damaged property, set fires, used Molotov cocktails, blocked roads, and attacked security forces. His death sentence got upheld by the Supreme Court and carried out early Saturday morning. This execution remains part of an ongoing crackdown, with several others executed recently on similar charges, including two men for attempting to storm a military site and another for setting fire to a mosque.

## Location
Isfahan, Iran

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @MyLordBebo OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
Iran protests, execution, government crackdown, civil unrest, Mossad allegations, Isfahan uprising
